title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — nfd.node.kubernetes.io/extended-resources
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
nfd.node.kubernetes.io/extended-resources: "accelerator.acme.example/q500,example.com/coprocessor-fx5"
Used on: Nodes
This annotation records a comma-separated list of
extended resources
managed by
Node Feature Discovery
(NFD).
NFD uses this for an internal mechanism. You should not edit this annotation yourself.
